blocks.text: Heavy-duty plastic crates, lidded bins, divider trays, and organizers made in Vietnam & China. Built for warehouse, retail, and field use — reusable, easy to clean, and brandable.
Artificial Boxes – Durable Plastic Packaging for Industry & Logistic

Our plastic packaging manufacturer in Vietnam supplies custom plastic boxes, HDPE crates, and PP containers built for durability, stackability, and visibility. Designed for industrial, logistics, and retail applications, our products are engineered for long-term use and full recyclability.
XinYuan manufactures artificial plastic boxes and trays engineered for strength, reusability, and clean presentation.

Our factories in Vietnam and China produce polypropylene (PP) and HDPE boxes ideal for logistics, retail, and industrial use.They’re fully washable, stackable, and recyclable, offering sustainable performance for modern supply chains.
• Smooth inner walls for easy cleaning
Smooth inner walls for easy cleaning
• Optional lids, dividers, and drainage holes
Optional lids, dividers, and drainage holes

Our Vietnam and China facilities operate automated molding and precision finishing lines, producing over 1 million plastic crates and packaging components annually. Each design reduces weight while maximizing strength — a sustainable alternative to single-use corrugated packaging.

assorted colored plastic baskets filled with small items

blocks.text: XinYuan’s artificial plastic boxes are built for efficient logistics and long-term use across diverse industries.They’re designed to integrate seamlessly with modern warehouse systems — from conveyors and shelving to pallet storage.
• Distribution & warehousing — stackable totes and crates for automation lines
Distribution & warehousing — stackable totes and crates for automation lines
• Retail & e-commerce — durable bins for order fulfillment
Retail & e-commerce — durable bins for order fulfillment
• Food industry — hygienic, washable, food-grade PP crates
Food industry — hygienic, washable, food-grade PP crates

We also support custom sizes, branding, and color-matching to align with your company identity.All products meet ISO 9001 quality control standards and can be made with recycled content for greener supply chains.
